reasoning: Initial observation suggests a linear relationship between x, v, t, and x0. Increasing t might help confirm if x changes linearly over time.
Increasing t did not change x, suggesting x is not directly dependent on t. Now I will increase v to observe its effect.

Increasing v from 5.0 to 10.0 doubled the value of x from 15.0 to 30.0 while keeping t constant at 3.0. This suggests that x is directly proportional to v. To confirm, I will now increase x0 and observe the effect on x.
Increasing x0 from 0.0 to 10.0 increased x from 30.0 to 40.0, indicating that x is also directly proportional to x0. Given the observations, x appears to be the sum of x0 and the product of v and t.
